changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: Sorry, the changelog is currently only available in Chinese

home.description: A fabric-carpet extension with many Carpet-style utility tools and interesting features

description.1: These rules allow you to control the game and change game behavior.
description.2: Does not change the vanilla game by default

description.1: These recipes allow you to create hard-to-obtain items using simple items
description.2: You need to enable the corresponding rule to use the recipes

description.1: These commands allow you to perform special operations
description.2: You need to enable the corresponding rule to use the commands

description.1: Contributions to the mod are welcome
description.2: To report bugs, please submit issues in the corresponding repository

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: This is a list of all rules, you can use the /carpet list CAA command in-game to view them

glowingHopperMinecart.name: glowingHopperMinecart
glowingHopperMinecart.desc: When a hopper minecart is locked, it glows red; otherwise, it glows white.

sitOnTheGround.name: sitOnTheGround
sitOnTheGround.desc: Sit on the ground by crouching multiple times.

lockAllHopper.name: lockAllHopper
lockAllHopper.desc: All hoppers will be locked, regardless of whether they receive a redstone signal.

keepOpeningVault.name: keepOpeningVault
keepOpeningVault.desc: The same player can open the same vault repeatedly.

lockAllHopperMinecart.name: lockAllHopperMinecart
lockAllHopperMinecart.desc: All hopper minecarts will be locked, regardless of whether the rail beneath them is a powered activator rail.

cactusWrench.name: cactusWrench
cactusWrench.desc: When holding a cactus in the off-hand, placed blocks face the opposite direction.

tameHorse.name: tameHorse
tameHorse.desc: You can tame horses with 100% success.

safeMagmaBlock.name: safeMagmaBlock
safeMagmaBlock.desc: You no longer take damage when standing on magma blocks.

toughTurtleEgg.name: toughTurtleEgg
toughTurtleEgg.desc: Turtle eggs cannot be broken by stepping on them.

removeEnderPearlDamage.name: removeEnderPearlDamage
removeEnderPearlDamage.desc: The ender pearl will not cause damage after transmission

dragonEggRecipe.name: dragonEggRecipe
dragonEggRecipe.desc: Added a proper recipe for the dragon egg.

dragonBreathRecipe.name: dragonBreathRecipe
dragonBreathRecipe.desc: Added a proper recipe for dragon's breath.
